text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day off, I decide to have lunch off campus
for a change of pace, and find myself unable to
decipher a menu written in a foreign language.
choice_data_list: (I can't make head nor tail of this...)

text_block_list.text: Hah, looks like you don't know a lick of French.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn to toward the voice coming from the next
table next over.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You can't read the menu, can you? Need some
help?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I'll only tell you what it says, though. It's still
up to you to figure out what's good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words are strangely loaded. Should I swallow
my pride and ask for help?
choice_data_list: I'll try to do it myself.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Suit yourself. Hope that works out for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, after I manage to order...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Nothin' but veggies? That's some
luck you got there.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Come on, cheer up. Meals are supposed to be
happy occasions.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I better lend you a hand. Here, pass
your plate over.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: All finished. It wasn't bad, but...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
A meal of only veggies really leaves something to
be desired. It's not filling. You know what I'm
saying, right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Take me right now, for example. I'm still
famished, and here in front of me, there's a...
soft... juicy...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, haha, hahaha! Relax, I'm not gonna gobble
you up or anything.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Not this time, at least.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Good on you for being honest. Now, let's start
with some appetizers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli explains the menu items and places
the order for me. Shortly after...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
An appetizer, soup, and a main to top it off. Not
bad, eh?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: You're thanking me?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Come on, now. It's a bit early for that, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ponder what she means until the food is
delivered... and she moves it all to her own table.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hate to break it to you, but I was just giving you
an example. In other words, I was ordering for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't look at me like that! You'll only make
me want to tease you more.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Now try and order on your own. Show me whether
or not you've learned anything.
